title: iberis halophila
intro: Iberis halophila, also known as sea candytuft, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iberis halophila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. Iberis halophila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
